series_metadata.series_title: Murder & Homicide Felony Offense Investigation Files
series_metadata.series_description: Case files from Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) investigative units pertaining to criminal investigations that result in felony charges of aggravated murder and murder falling under ORC 2903.01 and 2903.02. Records include, but are not limited to, request for assistance, reports, evidence submission sheets, custody records, recordings, subpoenas, laboratory notes, and photos.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain permanently, unless in paper or microfilm. ; Paper: Retain permanently, unless in microfilm. ; Microform: Retain permanently., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent
